## deleteFolderDescriptor variable

Centralized descriptor for the `delete-folder` command.

Drives the CLI subcommand `delete-folder` and the MCP tool `folder_delete`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
deleteFolderDescriptor: import("../registry/define.js").ResolvedCommandDescriptor<{
    folderId: string;
}, DeleteFolderResult, z.ZodObject<{
    folderId: z.ZodString;
}, "strip", z.ZodTypeAny, {
    folderId: string;
}, {
    folderId: string;
}>>
```
